description: Mapping from upstream ultimatepp/ultimatepp monolithic IDE sources to the split headless/Core and GUI packages used here.
notes: pkg reuses uppsrc/ide/Core for headless package, workspace, and build graph behavior.
Keep the headless core split in sync with pkg because pkg depends on ide/Core as its canonical parser and build-graph layer.

destinations.semantic: GUI application bootstrap and IDE session startup
Shared headless declarations and core package API
Shim package manifest that selects the GUI or console split
Shared headless declarations for package/workspace parsing and build graph helpers
Package manifest parsing, acceptflags, and source-file scan logic for the headless core
Workspace loading, package expansion, and dependency traversal for the headless core
Console-only entrypoint for the headless IDE shell
GUI application bootstrap and IDE session startup
